summary: All 12 tasks complete. Created harness-docs-pipeline orchestrator skill with 6 phases (FRESHEN, DETECT, FIX, AUDIT, FILL, REPORT), convergence-based remediation, safety-classified fixes, AGENTS.md bootstrap, and qualitative PASS/WARN/FAIL health report. Added pipeline context awareness to all 4 sub-skills. Updated documentation-maintainer persona. Created change delta.
learnings: Tasks 2-8 (incremental SKILL.md construction) must be combined into a single file write because structure tests require ## Process, ## Examples, ## Gates, and ## Escalation sections to exist
lint-staged stash/restore can include unrelated modified files in commits — same recurring pattern from prior sessions
harness-docs-pipeline SKILL.md was committed by lint-staged stash/restore before explicit commit — always check git log for the file before assuming it needs committing

3 of 4 sub-skill SKILL.md files (detect-doc-drift, align-documentation, validate-context-engineering) are hardlinked between claude-code and gemini-cli — editing claude-code auto-syncs gemini-cli. harness-knowledge-mapper is NOT hardlinked and needs manual copy.
